g.text: Use the Amazon Web Services (AWS) provider to interact with the many resources supported by AWS. You
must configure the provider with the proper credentials before you can use it.
Use the navigation to the left to read about the available resources. There are currently 1499
resources and 606 data sources available in the provider.
To learn the basics of Terraform using this provider, follow the hands-on
Interact with AWS services, including Lambda, RDS, and IAM by following the
